sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113007" key="xalinagwgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰλῑνᾰγωγ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113007.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">guiding as by bit and bridle,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν τῆς νεότητος παθῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg006:p.119D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Epict.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.119D.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
